description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Kong Gateway with Prometheus metrics. Covers HTTP traffic, latency percentiles, upstream health, database status, Nginx connections, plugin execution, memory usage, rate limiting, authentication, per-instance monitoring, and stream proxy metrics.
title: Kong Gateway — Prometheus Monitoring

variables.name: instance
variables.queryValue: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM kong_http_requests_total WITH KEY = instance

variables.name: service
variables.queryValue: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM kong_http_requests_total WITH KEY = service

variables.name: route
variables.queryValue: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM kong_http_requests_total WITH KEY = route

widgets.description: Total HTTP requests handled by Kong Gateway in the selected time range
widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Current number of active Nginx connections
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Total bandwidth consumed in the selected time range
widgets.title: Total Bandwidth

widgets.description: Whether the Kong datastore (Postgres/Cassandra) is reachable. 1 = reachable, 0 = unreachable
widgets.title: Datastore Reachable

widgets.description: Overall request rate across all Kong services and routes
widgets.title: Request Rate (req/s)

widgets.description: Rate of 4xx and 5xx HTTP error responses from Kong Gateway
widgets.title: 4xx / 5xx Error Rate

widgets.description: Percentage of requests resulting in errors
widgets.title: Error Percentage (%)

widgets.description: Percentage of requests returning 2xx status codes
widgets.title: Success Rate (%)

widgets.description: Request rate broken down by Kong service name
widgets.title: Requests by Service

widgets.description: Request rate broken down by Kong route name
widgets.title: Requests by Route

widgets.description: Request rate broken down by HTTP status code
widgets.title: Requests by Status Code

widgets.description: Request rate broken down by HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)
widgets.title: Requests by HTTP Method

widgets.description: Inbound bandwidth rate per service
widgets.title: Bandwidth Ingress

widgets.description: Outbound bandwidth rate per service
widgets.title: Bandwidth Egress

widgets.description: Total bandwidth rate split by ingress and egress
widgets.title: Total Bandwidth by Direction

widgets.description: Bandwidth rate broken down by route and direction
widgets.title: Bandwidth by Route

widgets.description: Rate of successful (2xx) requests per service
widgets.title: Successful Requests by Service (2xx)

widgets.description: Rate of client error (4xx) responses per service
widgets.title: Client Errors by Service (4xx)

widgets.description: Rate of server error (5xx) responses per service
widgets.title: Server Errors by Service (5xx)

widgets.description: Request rate broken down by Kong consumer (authenticated user/app)
widgets.title: Requests by Consumer

widgets.description: Total request count per service over the selected time range
widgets.title: Request Volume by Service (Table)

widgets.description: Total request count per route over the selected time range
widgets.title: Request Volume by Route (Table)

widgets.description: Overall request latency at the 50th, 90th, and 99th percentiles (includes Kong + upstream processing)
widgets.title: Request Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: Upstream target latency at the 50th, 90th, and 99th percentiles (time spent waiting for upstream response)
widgets.title: Upstream Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: Kong internal processing latency at the 50th, 90th, and 99th percentiles (plugin execution, routing, etc.)
widgets.title: Kong Processing Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: Side-by-side comparison of total request, upstream, and Kong processing latency at the 90th percentile
widgets.title: Latency Breakdown (P90)

widgets.description: 90th percentile request latency broken down by service
widgets.title: Request Latency by Service (P90)

widgets.description: 90th percentile request latency broken down by route
widgets.title: Request Latency by Route (P90)

widgets.description: 90th percentile upstream latency broken down by service
widgets.title: Upstream Latency by Service (P90)

widgets.description: 90th percentile Kong processing latency broken down by service
widgets.title: Kong Processing Latency by Service (P90)

widgets.description: Average request latency across all services
widgets.title: Average Request Latency

widgets.description: Average upstream response time across all services
widgets.title: Average Upstream Latency

widgets.description: Average request latency per service
widgets.title: Average Latency by Service

widgets.description: Distribution of request latencies across histogram buckets
widgets.title: Request Latency Distribution

widgets.description: Number of healthy upstream targets across all upstreams
widgets.title: Upstream Target Health

widgets.description: Number of unhealthy upstream targets. Alert if this is above 0.
widgets.title: Unhealthy Targets

widgets.description: Number of upstream targets with DNS resolution errors
widgets.title: DNS Error Targets

widgets.description: Total number of configured upstream targets
widgets.title: Total Upstream Targets

widgets.description: Health status of upstream targets grouped by upstream name
widgets.title: Upstream Health by Upstream

widgets.description: Health status of individual upstream targets over time
widgets.title: Upstream Health by Target

widgets.description: Table showing the current health state of all upstream targets
widgets.title: Upstream Health Status (Table)

widgets.description: Nginx connection states: active, reading (request headers), writing (response), and waiting (keep-alive)
widgets.title: Connection States

widgets.description: Rate of accepted and handled connections. A gap between these indicates dropped connections.
widgets.title: Accepted & Handled Connections

widgets.description: Active Nginx connections over time
widgets.title: Active Connections Over Time

widgets.description: Number of idle keep-alive connections waiting for new requests
widgets.title: Waiting (Keep-Alive) Connections

widgets.description: Total worker connections (active + waiting)
widgets.title: Nginx Worker Connections

widgets.description: Estimated number of Kong Nginx worker processes
widgets.title: Worker Processes

widgets.description: Active connections broken down by Kong node/instance
widgets.title: Connections per Node

widgets.description: Memory usage of Nginx shared memory zones (Lua shared dictionaries)
widgets.title: Shared Memory Used Bytes

widgets.description: Total allocated capacity for each Nginx shared memory zone
widgets.title: Shared Memory Capacity

widgets.description: Percentage of each shared memory zone currently in use. Alert if approaching 100%.
widgets.title: Shared Memory Utilization (%)

widgets.description: Kong datastore reachability. 1 = reachable, 0 = unreachable
widgets.title: Database Reachable

widgets.description: Datastore reachability over time per Kong node
widgets.title: Database Reachable Over Time

widgets.description: Database cache hit rate. Higher is better. Low values indicate frequent DB lookups.
widgets.title: Cache Hit Rate (%)

widgets.description: Rate of database cache misses per second
widgets.title: Cache Miss Rate

widgets.description: Rate of database cache hits and misses over time
widgets.title: Cache Hit vs Miss Rate

widgets.description: Database cache hit rate percentage over time
widgets.title: Cache Hit Rate Over Time (%)

widgets.description: Total number of entities stored in the Kong database
widgets.title: DB Entities

widgets.description: Total number of database entity errors
widgets.title: DB Entity Errors

widgets.description: 90th percentile execution latency per plugin. High values indicate slow plugins.
widgets.title: Plugin Execution Latency (P90)

widgets.description: Median (50th percentile) execution latency per plugin
widgets.title: Plugin Execution Latency (P50)

widgets.description: Rate of plugin executions per second, broken down by plugin name

widgets.description: Average latency per plugin execution

widgets.description: 90th percentile plugin latency grouped by service
widgets.title: Plugin Latency by Service (P90)

widgets.description: Comparison of total Kong processing latency vs plugin-only latency at P90. The gap represents non-plugin Kong overhead.
widgets.title: Total Plugin Time vs Kong Latency

widgets.description: Lua VM memory usage per Nginx worker process
widgets.title: Lua VM Memory (Workers)

widgets.description: Lua VM memory usage grouped by subsystem (http, stream)
widgets.title: Lua Memory by Subsystem

widgets.description: Top 10 shared dictionaries by memory usage
